2603.18597.title: myMNIST: Benchmark of PETNN, KAN, and Classical Deep Learning Models for Burmese Handwritten Digit Recognition
2603.18597.paper_summary: We present the first systematic benchmark on myMNIST (formerly BHDD), a publicly available Burmese handwritten digit dataset important for Myanmar NLP/AI research. We evaluate eleven architectures spanning classical deep learning models (Multi-Layer Perceptron, Convolutional Neural Network, Long Short-Term Memory, Gated Recurrent Unit, Transformer), recent alternatives (FastKAN, EfficientKAN), an energy-based model (JEM), and physics-inspired PETNN variants (Sigmoid, GELU, SiLU). Using Precision, Recall, F1-Score, and Accuracy as evaluation metrics, our results show that the CNN remains a strong baseline, achieving the best overall scores (F1 = 0.9959, Accuracy = 0.9970). The PETNN (GELU) model closely follows (F1 = 0.9955, Accuracy = 0.9966), outperforming LSTM, GRU, Transformer, and KAN variants. JEM, representing energy-based modeling, performs competitively (F1 = 0.9944, Accuracy = 0.9958). KAN-based models (FastKAN, EfficientKAN) trail the top performers but provide a meaningful alternative baseline (Accuracy ~0.992). These findings (i) establish reproducible baselines for myMNIST across diverse modeling paradigms, (ii) highlight PETNN's strong performance relative to classical and Transformer-based models, and (iii) quantify the gap between energy-inspired PETNNs and a true energy-based model (JEM). We release this benchmark to facilitate future research on Myanmar digit recognition and to encourage broader evaluation of emerging architectures on regional scripts.
2603.18597.paper_summary_zh: 我們呈現了對 myMNIST（前稱 BHDD）的首次系統性基準測試，這是一個對緬甸 NLP/AI 研究重要的公開可用緬甸手寫數字數據集。<lb/>我們評估了十一種架構，涵蓋了經典的深度學習模型（多層感知器、卷積神經網絡、長短期記憶、門控循環單元、Transformer）、最近的替代方案（FastKAN、EfficientKAN）、一個基於能量的模型（JEM），以及受物理啟發的 PETNN 變體（Sigmoid、GELU、SiLU）。<lb/>使用精確度、召回率、F1 分數和準確率作為評估指標，我們的結果顯示 CNN 仍然是一個強大的基準，達到最佳的整體分數（F1 = 0.9959，準確率 = 0.9970）。<lb/>PETNN（GELU）模型緊隨其後（F1 = 0.9955，準確率 = 0.9966），超越了 LSTM、GRU、Transformer和 KAN 變體。<lb/>JEM 作為基於能量的建模，表現競爭力（F1 = 0.9944，準確率 = 0.9958）。<lb/>基於 KAN 的模型（FastKAN、EfficientKAN）落後於頂尖表現者，但提供了有意義的替代基準（準確率約為 0.992）。<lb/>這些發現 (i) 為 myMNIST 在多樣建模範式中建立了可重複的基準，(ii) 突顯了 PETNN 相對於經典和基於Transformer模型的強勁表現，以及 (iii) 量化了受能量啟發的 PETNN 與真正基於能量的模型（JEM）之間的差距。<lb/>我們發布這個基準以促進未來對緬甸數字識別的研究，並鼓勵對新興架構在區域字母上的更廣泛評估。
2603.18597.author: Ye Kyaw Thu et.al.
2603.18597.authors: Ye Kyaw Thu, Thazin Myint Oo, Thepchai Supnithi
